response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, with strong proficiency in C/C++ and embedded systems (e.g., National Instruments, robotic arms), but his profile is heavily skewed toward web and application development rather than embedded networking security. While he demonstrates adaptability and technical depth, he lacks direct experience with Linux kernel modifications, network switch operations, or security features like MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, or Captive Portal. His non-European language skills (Japanese) are not evident, and his focus on high-level architectures and frameworks may not align with the hands-on, mid-senior embedded role.
strengths: Strong C/C++ experience with embedded systems (e.g., National Instruments, robotic arms)
Experience with protocol development and low-latency applications (e.g., RIDE Capital, Dunnhumby)
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies and domains (e.g., switching between D, Java, TypeScript)
concerns: Minimal or no experience with Linux kernel modifications, network switch operations, or security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X)
No evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency or experience with Japanese-speaking environments
Profile heavily skewed toward web/app development rather than embedded networking security

key_factors.factor: C programming and Linux kernel proficiency
